programme.title: The Future with Hannah Fry

programme.desc: A podcaster in need of catchy Christmas content offers to help Daniyal win over his love in exchange for the ability to record the process. As the two work together, it becomes clear that Daniyal might be trying to win over the wrong woman.

programme.title: The Love Advisor
programme.desc: A lowly assistant secretly writes the love advice for her boss' podcast. When she learns her favorite journalist is a fan of the show, she must decide if love is worth putting her career at risk.

programme.title: Three Dates to Forever
programme.desc: Sparks fly when popular radio host Kathy Rae and carefree tech entrepreneur John Reed are paired by his new dating app live on air.

programme.title: A Royal in Paradise
programme.desc: Struggling with writer's block after a breakup, Olivia takes a tropical holiday in hopes of some inspiration and meets Prince Alexander, who needs some distance from his upcoming duty to marry royalty.

programme.title: Finding Love in Saint Lucia
programme.desc: An Ornithologist and a Journalist partner up to save an endangered bird species in the jungle of Saint Lucia. They immediately fall in love with the nature, and in the process, they also fall for each other.

programme.title: Love Map
programme.desc: A self-assured relationship columnist who is about to launch a dating app is sent on assignment with a prickly tour guide to create a real map of the most romantic places in Florida.

programme.title: Love Marks the Spot
programme.desc: In order to save her home publishing company from being sold, ghostwriter Becca must go all the way to Arcania with famed action star Lee to secure movie rights to the popular "Lover's Quest" series.

programme.title: A Royal in Paradise
programme.desc: Struggling with writer's block after a breakup, Olivia takes a tropical holiday in hopes of some inspiration and meets Prince Alexander, who needs some distance from his upcoming duty to marry royalty.

programme.title: Finding Love in Saint Lucia
programme.desc: An Ornithologist and a Journalist partner up to save an endangered bird species in the jungle of Saint Lucia. They immediately fall in love with the nature, and in the process, they also fall for each other.

programme.title: Love Map
programme.desc: A self-assured relationship columnist who is about to launch a dating app is sent on assignment with a prickly tour guide to create a real map of the most romantic places in Florida.

programme.title: The Librarian: Return to King Solomon's Mines
programme.desc: An adventurer (Noah Wyle) and a brilliant archaeologist (Gabrielle Anwar) use a map to search for the fabled mines of King Solomon.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: After seeing a vision of her own death at the hands of a supernatural assassin, Baird attempts to stop the deadly prophecy from coming true.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Tears of a Clown
programme.desc: The librarians investigate a traveling carnival where they discover the sinister secret of a magician who has been corrupted by the use of real magic.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Trial of the Triangle
programme.desc: In order to stop the spread of pure evil, the team must find the Eye of Ra and unravel the mystery of the Bermuda Triangle; Flynn must pass a series of tests.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Cindy Kroger suddenly becomes popular thanks to a magical love potion; the librarians must stop Cindy before she launches a love missile that would force the entire world to become her fan base.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians are led to a holistic spa that is run by vampires when a rash of people spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The balance of the universe is put in jeopardy when the Monkey King's sacred homeland of Shangri-La is taken over by a ruthless collector of magical artifacts.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The library is simultaneously infiltrated by DOSA and Apep; Flynn, Baird, Stone, Cassandra, Ezekiel and Jenkins must put aside their differences to save the library, the world and themselves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: A secret sect of the Vatican Church unearths a map detailing the locations of the four cornerstones of the Library of Alexandria; Flynn and the Librarians work with an unexpected ally to stop them before the stones can be used to destroy the Library.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When people begin getting hurt in the unluckiest of ways, the Librarians follow the trail to a casino where the owner appears to possess an artifact capable of stealing people's luck.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Santa takes Flynn, Baird and Jenkins on his first vacation in centuries; the Librarians use Santa's sleigh to save Ezekiel's career-criminal mother, as well as Christmas itself, from Santa's grinch of a brother, the Patron Saint of Thieves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Drawn into the world of Baird's favorite film noir movie, the Librarians must perfect their skills in lassoing, sharpshooting and snappy dialogue to make it out alive.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn is excited to team up with his Librarian hero, Darrington Dare, to take down an ancient and powerful enemy let loose in the modern day; Darrington leaves the Librarians with a dire warning that there can only be one Librarian.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team tries to get a violent hedge fund manager to reveal information that could lead to Damien Moreau.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team takes over a mall on Christmas Eve and uncovers a scheme perpetrated by an old nemesis; Eliot goes undercover as Santa Claus; Parker and Hardison are Santa's helpers.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team infiltrates a government research lab to stop Damien Moreau from auctioning information to international terrorists.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: After following Moreau to San Lorenzo, the team discovers that he is chief advisor to the current President.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team must recover lost evidence from a mountain while battling hired guns and bad weather.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When a mark is killed during a sting, the team races to complete the con and find the killer.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team attempts to take down a corrupt PR consultant by using his own methods against him.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: While tracking a Van Gogh painting, the team learns the painting was the center of a World War II love story.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team infiltrates a corrupt group involved in corporate agriculture to recover a stolen object.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: While the team infiltrates a high-tech home to steal a computer chip, the family's child is abducted from a carnival.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The crew sets its sites on a funeral director who embezzles money from grieving patrons.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team goes up against a con man from a long lineage of greats.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team tries to retrieve a stolen heart intended for a 15-year-old patient.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Sterling convinces the team to steal a calibration weight for a nuclear reactor during an international chess tournament.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team must infiltrate the world of secret societies when homeless veterans in the Boston area begin to disappear.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: While trying to uncover an embezzlement scam, the team becomes part of a documentary shooting at the company they are trying to save.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When a thief targets Parker's friend, Parker, Sophie and Tara track the thief to the Venezuelan Consulate.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Nate, Eliot and Hardison must intervene when Hurley is caught up in a drug deal.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman asks the team to find his missing wife, they learn the missing woman is part of a ring of grifters running Sweetheart Scams, in which pretty young women woo and wed older men for their money.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team targets a corrupt pair of siblings and steers them through an elaborate treasure hunt.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: Latimer hires Nate's father to do a heist in a government office; the team must stage a hostage stand-off when they are trapped inside a building.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: The team is forced to recruit old friends and rivals in order to take down Latimer and an enemy from their past.

programme.title: Leverage
programme.desc: A shipping CEO's cost-cutting measures result in a plane crash; the team cons a CEO into buying the Spruce Goose.

programme.title: The Magic of Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: Yael and Felicia travel to the set of "Leverage: Redemption" in New Orleans to learn the secrets behind the cast and crew who bring the show to life; cast members share their feelings about when they heard the series was returning.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Programa de juegos en donde los concursantes compiten en desafíos de un minuto con niveles crecientes de dificultad para tener la oportunidad de ganar un premio en efectivo.

programme.title: La máscara del amor
programme.desc: Un protagonista llega a buscar el amor entre cinco pretendientes enmascarados, quienes pueden participar por el amor o por el interés de un premio al final del show.

programme.title: Renuncia por motivos de salud
programme.desc: Un empleado del gobierno quiere alejarse de la corrupción, pero se ve atrapado entre perderlo todo o unirse al juego.

programme.title: Retofamosos

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares Carne Adovada.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Nashville Hot Pheasant and Mint Basil Lemonade
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern takes a spin on Nashville-style hot fried chicken. Hot and spicy, batter coated, crispy fried pheasant is paired with a spinach salad topped with bacon vinaigrette and ice cold mint basil lemonade.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Easy Meals at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie shares his gorgeous festive food gift ideas, including a sumptuous roasted mulled wine ham, flavoured cheeses and a yule log.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's Easy Meals at Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie gets creative with leftovers and makes a pie with turkey, stuffing, gravy and sprouts and creates an epic Christmas strudel.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern prepares the ultimate shore lunch of fried walleye filets, served with a tangy homemade tartar sauce, coleslaw, and crispy fried potatoes. Next, chef grills bone-in elk chops with a simple mustard glaze over hardwood charcoal.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Creamy Clam Chowder and Mussels in Spicy Tomato Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern demystifies cooking clams, mussels and oysters.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reimagines the Hawaiian plate lunch with a hand chopped venison burger topped with homemade gravy and a fried egg, jumbo grilled shrimp, a humble macaroni salad and a heaping scoop of white rice.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern grills his favorite tender cuts of venison and serves it with coal-roasted sweet potatoes. Then, he cooks a hearty pot of classic Louisiana gumbo using wild duck and grills crispy-skinned duck breast for the topping.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares his favorite way to prepare wild turkey breast, pan-fried over an open fire. Served with cheese sauce and jalapeno-bacon wild rice. Then, cooks a simple meal of seared salmon and a side of crispy potatoes and onions.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Elk Tenderloin Tostadas and Grilled Rack of Ribs
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights lean elk, first crafting classic Mexican tostadas with grilled tenderloin, avocado, and homemade salsa macha. Then, he grills a whole rack of elk, serving it with creamy colcannon, tarragon emulsion, and rosemary charcoal.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde kicks the summer off right with a burger blowout featuring Brisket Burgers with Grilled Onions and Blue Cheese, Shrimp Burgers with XO Sauce and a Fried Egg, and Lamb Sliders with Feta Ranch and don't forget the Lemon Oregano Fries.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's always taco night at Chef Dale's house! He turns up the heat with grilled salmon tacos with salsa verde & cauliflower escabeche, duck al pastor tacos with habanero pineapple salsa, & a smokey mushroom queso taco with truffle mole negro.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde is back to level up his steak game by grilling up a NY strip steak with roasted onions & poblanos, short ribs with chili paste and horseradish, and a grilled chateaubriand with charred broccolini. Steak your claim on these dishes!

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde creates a tasty menu that kids & parents alike will love! Apple pancakes with coconut brown butter syrup, grilled cheese & tomato soup, cheesy chicken parm, and a sticky s'mores dessert rounds out the full day of deliciousness.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale is flipping burgers into art - gooey mac & cheese burgers, fancy French patties topped with melty bucheron cheese, crispy parm-truffle fries, and peanut butter fudge ice cream sandwiches. Get hungry.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: The Art of Open Fire Cooking
programme.desc: Chef Dale goes back to the roots of cooking, building a grill over an open fire to serve up a variety of dishes, including whole smoked chicken and fish, roasted cauliflower, a sweet and tangy grilled pineapple s'more dessert.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde brings us to the bayou as he creates a NOLA-inspired menu complete with Chargrilled Oysters, Black Pepper Shrimp Po'boys, finishes it off with Bananas Foster, and washes it all down with a Fruity Grilled Hurricane.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: It's burger day! Chef Dale tackles three classics with a full flavor spin. Game changing Pho Burgers with bone marrow, toasted milk bread Ahi Tuna patty melts, and Chori Pan Burgers with a fried egg and shrimp chips.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Thanksgiving goes to the grill with Chef Dale-juicy spatchcock turkey, grilled sage-cornbread stuffing, smoked green bean casserole, and pumpkin donut bread pudding drenched in bourbon brown butter sauce.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.sub-title: A Festive & Flavorful Christmas in July
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde grills smoked ham and pineapple praline sliders, sweet potatoes with soy maple bacon, eggplant with labneh and cranberries, a holiday mezze plate and a grilled coquito cocktail.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Discovering Indian Lamb Kebabs in Nashville
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb mamna and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Roscoe Family Legacy: Alabama Pit Ribs
programme.desc: Pat heads to Birmingham to team up with artist and chef Roscoe Hall, cooking ribs inspired by Roscoe's family legacy.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat and his pal Jason Stanhope meet up outside of Charleston for a day of quail hunting and grilling birds over live coals.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat fishes the coastal inlets of Charleston, South Carolina, in search of a delicious sheepshead, which he plans to grill with his friend and chef James London.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: For pig roast perfection, Chef Andrew Zimmern marinates a whole hog.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Zimmern cooks his version of Peking-style goose. Next, Chef Zimmern cooks a meal of striped bass.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew prepares a crave-able appetizer of bison tenderloin bites served with tamarind sauce and a classic Hunan peanut sauce. Then chef grills prosciutto-wrapped whole trout stuffed with lemon and herbs served with rice pilaf.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Braised Pigeon with Homemade Herb Gnocchi
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern cooks braised squab with olives and vinegar, a perfect meal for a fall evening.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Bison Tomahawk Chop with Italian-style Eggplant and Panzanella
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares a simple trick for getting the most out Bison tomahawk chops.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole tuna and serves it three ways: grilled, raw, and poached.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern butchers a whole rabbit, then braises the meat in a rich and flavorful red chile sauce. He tops it off with a simple blended tomatillo salsa and fresh cilantro. Next, chef Zimmern cooks a comforting farmhouse meal of pheasant.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Boar Ribs and Shrimp and Grits
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern makes a homemade barbecue rub, basting sauce and barbecue sauce for wild boar ribs. Next, chef shares his twist on a classic southern shrimp and grits recipe, adding a side of beautiful wild mushrooms.

programme.sub-title: Venison Paillard and Hearty Hunter's Stew

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: On this special delivery episode of Struggle Meals, Frankie explores three ways to make delicious pizzas, and shares clever tips to make an A+ pie without dropping your dough on expensive ingredients.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Bonsoir, indeed! Join Frankie as he cooks up elegant but achievable French classics that will transport you to an evening on the Seine, complete with some savvy wine tips without the hefty cost of a plane ticket.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Thanksgiving dinner will be a breeze this year thanks to Frankie's struggle tips for a delicious holiday meal. From a simple turkey entree to a new twist on a classic dessert, Frankie makes a feast without unstuffing his wallet.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Start a new tradition at the dinner table this year with a meat free spin on your favorite main courses. Learn new tips and tricks to make your veggie forward dinner so delightful that even the biggest meat eaters will be back for seconds.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie kicks it up a notch in the Struggle Kitchen with flavor-packed, spicy recipes, and some hot tips for adding layers of flavor. But don't sweat it, these warming dishes won't burn your cash or your tastebuds.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Finicky family coming to town? Fear not, for Frankie's sharing all the struggle tips and tricks to keep the stress levels low and the enjoyment high with simple, delicious meals to please everyone at the table.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: 'Tis the jolly season of giving, but this year, there will be no more struggles in making your list and checking it twice. Frankie's festive, budget-friendly treats are the sweetest way to tell your friends and family you love them.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: There's no better way to spread some holiday spirit than at the dinner table with these decadent, festive recipes that can make any long, dark night feel warm and merry.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: With the help of a friend, Frankie serves up easy and delicious recipes based on take out favorites everyone will enjoy at home. No need to shell out extra cash for delivery fees!

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Wow your party guests this New Years Eve by serving these fancy but frugal dishes to ring in the year right. From appetizers to mocktails, everyone will enjoy your spread!

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie explores his Italian roots, pairing each pasta shape with its perfect sauce-from Cavatelli with Super Green Sauce to Pappardelle in pork ragout, ricotta Gnocchi with punchy anchovy pecorino, and cozy Squash Orzotto with bloomed poppy seeds.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie makes pizza magic with two incredible doughs, turning his kitchen into a pizza party with grilled sausage pizza, cheesy Grandma Pies, golden Panzerotti, and a sweet dessert pizza topped with ricotta, berries, and honey.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie fires up a steakhouse-style spread with Italian flair from golden beets and buttery mushrooms to a sizzling Bistecca alla Fiorentina steak with salmoriglio sauce, and a smooth cold brew affogato granita.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie reunites his old band for a jam session and a spin on a college-era classic - featuring Shoyu Ramen with Tare Eggs, sweet and savory Chicken Meatballs, Seaweed Cucumber Salad, and a crispy Okonomiyaki pancake.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.sub-title: Pancake Stacks and Snacks for Two
programme.desc: Frankie flips the script for his wife Heather making breakfast for dinner featuring Banana Maple Pancakes, Eggs Benedict with prosciutto cotto, Home Fries with Bloody Mary Ketchup, Sausage Scrapple, and a boozy Espresso Milkshake.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Festive Home Cooking
programme.sub-title: Christmas Brunch Fit for a King
programme.desc: Gordon and his family prepare an incredible array of dishes including an impressive brunch spread with griddled polenta topped with roasted tomatoes, and a family feast with truffled potatoes, prime beef filet and more.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Festive Home Cooking
programme.sub-title: Banana Tart is the Way to the Heart
programme.desc: Gordon and his family prepare an incredible array of dishes, including a festive roast duck, hoisin and cucumber salad, a decadent banana tart and more.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Festive Home Cooking
programme.sub-title: Sausage Hot Pot: The Ultimate Comfort Food

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lovers paradise and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.sub-title: A Perfect Home To Start A Family
programme.desc: Kevin and Danielle are looking for a home for their growing family. They're visiting some of the most desirable properties in Pasadena, California. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet married couple Henri and Chris who are in search of a luxury desert home. They need a house with the modern conveniences and a house to entertain at.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Chrissy's multi-purpose home needs help to be as vibrant as Chrissy and her podcast with Marie, while Raymond has a house to sell that needs staging in a hurry.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: After going way over time and budget renovating the main floor of their century home, Jake and Lorraine have run out of steam and need Nicole and Caffery to take on the second floor before their fast-approaching wedding!

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery design an executive rental suite to help supplement Vashti's path to retirement, while real estate agent Kelsey pursues Nicole and Caffery's much-needed staging expertise to help sell her clients' colorful and chaotic townhouse.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Lauren's childhood home needs big help to become the grown up family home for her, Kyle and their two boys, while real estate agent Odane needs expert staging to help his clients sell high, and buy their dream home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: Today we meet Dr Toni. He's an L.A. based celebrity chiropractor looking for a luxurious home in Park City, Utah. He wants a home large enough to host parties for family and friends. But he also wants a quiet retreat to relax.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Work From Home Meets Garden Goals
programme.desc: Gea and David are looking for more space for indoor offices and outdoor entertaining. They're visiting some of the most desirable properties in Cupertino, California. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is located in Bel Air, California. This stunning contemporary home has impressive views. Then we tour a European inspired chateau. We then travel to Melbourne in Australia and lastly we tour this newly renovated home in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Today we are looking at houses that personify luxury. The first home is located in Rancho Mirage, California. We check out a grand loft in Midtown Manhattan. Next we travel to Brighton, Australia and finally to Palm Springs, a boathouse property.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Our first home is in Brentwood, California, a bright and airy design. Then we tour a masterpiece in sunny California. We travel to Australia for a look at a renovated modern farmhouse. Lastly, we tour a six-bedroom masterpiece in Park City, Utah.
